summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. I am looking for guests to be on the podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. I am launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
Also, check out my podcast and AI summary recaps.
Star Atlas: Holosim Tutorial Walkthrough (Part 2)
Beyond the Horizon posted a video continuing a Holosim walkthrough.
Weekly Star Atlas Newsletter #184
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Atlas Brew #163 – C4 Q&A, Part 2
Star Atlas TV posted a video recording of the latest Atlas Brew.
Lore Keepers #12 – Chaos in C4 & Secrets of Holosim
Star Atlas TV posted a video recording of the latest Lore Keepers.
I am looking for guests to be on the podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
I am launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
I am creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support my efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
